name: Crystal Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 bag pickling spices (size of a walnut)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the thinly sliced cucumbers in 1 gallon of water and 1 cup of pickling salt for 5 days, stirring daily.
2. After 5 days, drain the cucumbers and rinse them with fresh water and 1 tablespoon alum; soak overnight.
3. Drain and rinse the cucumbers again.
4. Bring a pot of fresh water to a boil and cook the cucumbers for 10 minutes while adding 1 tablespoon of ginger. Drain and rinse the cucumbers once more.
5. Prepare the syrup by placing pickling spices in cheesecloth, tying it up, and boiling with sugar, water, salt, and vinegar until boiling. Add the cucumbers to the hot syrup and boil for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Remove the cheesecloth bag from the syrup while it remains hot and bottle the pickles immediately.
